introSection: Tigre de Sibérie is a steel roller coaster located at Le Pal in Dompierre Sur Besbre, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. It was formerly known as Grand 8.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This is one of two custom roller coasters from French company Reverchon.

fullText:
Tigre de Sibérie is a steel roller coaster located at Le Pal in Dompierre Sur Besbre, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. It was formerly known as Grand 8.

This is one of two custom roller coasters from French company Reverchon.

Yellow track and green supports.
